title: Update Recommendation Type
content:
# Update Recommendation Type

Updates an existing Recommendation Type with any new values passed through the body parameters. All body parameters are optional and if not provided will remain unchanged. Only the unique identifier `name` can not be changed.

## Endpoint

`POST /recommendations/types/{name}/update`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.recommendation.updateRecommendationType()
print(response)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Recommendation Type key `name` to update. Case sensitive name.

metadata.description: Detailed Attributes of the Recommendation Type. The structure of the `metadata` object can have any key/value structure.

created.description: UTC time when the Recommendation Type was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

created_by.description: The user or process that initiated the creation of this recommendation type.

name.description: Unique identifier `name` for the Recommendation Type.

metadata.description: Detailed Attributes of the Recommendation Type. The structure of the `metadata` object can have any key/value structure.

updated.description: UTC time when any Recommendation Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

updated_by.description: The user or process that updated this recommendation type.
